epigraph.quote: We each chose 100 BFr. (£2) of little chocolates in our own bags.

per_stop.quote: It went very well with Charles passing the food, John playing
went to the Channel Tunnel, eating garage sandwiches on the way.
Lovely barrel wheel for running in in the playground.
It is very difficult to find your way in Belgium because they only put signs actually at the turnings.
Clean loos, free hot showers, playground, easy access to the town.
We walked, looking at the beautiful gables of the houses.
